title: Roga Gharana Kripa Sakara
lyrics:
[Lali sithalu madanam ragam fast beat]
Roga Gharana kripa sakara sri guru ragavendra pari paliso..
Roga Gharana kripa sakara sri guru ragavendra pari paliso..
Santhatha dhurvathi dhvantha divakara santha vinuthamatha paliso..[
ragavendra pari paliso..]
Gannamahima jaganatha vittala priya Gannamahima jaganatha vittala priya
Niina araadhana madi so.. Niina araadhana madi so.. Niina araadhana madi
so.. ..[ ragavendra pari
paliso..]
